new_experiments.title: Application Identity Linked Roles
treatments: Treatment 1: Enable Application Identity Linked Roles

added.+z5dYe: Link your account through the game to continue
added.4l1DWw: Update your profile on Discord with your application activity.
added.8psEFX: Once connected, you'll be brought back here to complete authorization. Your {platformName} password is never shared with {applicationName} or Discord.
added.HbivnU: You must have the **{roleName}** role before you can send messages in this server.
added.MZbCuG: You must have the **{roleName}** role before you can speak in this server.
added.aJRE/Q: To authorize {applicationName}, you need to connect your {platformName} account to Discord first:
